lineart.png.caption: tag: casual_3d, object: fan, material: smooth_plastic, rarity: standard, visibility: high_contrast. A 3D casual mobile game asset of a purple and yellow desk fan. Thick rounded blades, smooth toy-like plastic material, clean soft gradients, vibrant colors.

lineart(1).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, object: barrel, material: matte_plastic, rarity: standard, visibility: high_contrast. A 3D casual mobile game asset of a yellow biohazard barrel leaking green toxic slime. Rounded corners, chunky proportions, clean soft gradients.

lineart(2).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, character: dragon, material: soft_matte, rarity: standard. A cute chubby green baby dinosaur/dragon sitting with red hearts above its head. Large adorable eyes, rounded smooth 3D shape, clean shading, casual mobile style.

lineart(3).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, character: bird, material: soft_matte, rarity: standard. A cute round chubby blue bird character. Big expressive eyes, tiny wings and beak, orange feet, soft gradient shading, cheerful and friendly, casual 3D style.

lineart(4).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, character: bunny, material: soft_matte, rarity: standard. A cute fluffy brown bunny holding a large orange carrot. Wearing blue overalls. Huge blue eyes, soft rounded 3D aesthetic, vibrant colors.

lineart(5).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, character: cat, material: smooth_matte, rarity: standard. A cute 3D maneki-neko lucky cat sitting on a red cushion holding a gold coin. Soft pastel colors, rounded shapes, smooth gradients, casual game UI asset.

lineart(6).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, object: mug, material: glossy_ceramic, rarity: standard. A 3D casual mobile game asset of a red mug filled with hot chocolate and square marshmallows, next to some cookies. Soft rounded forms, warm colors, clean rendering.

lineart(7).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, object: coffee_machine, material: smooth_plastic, rarity: standard. A 3D blue espresso coffee machine with a cup of coffee. Thick chunky shapes, toy-like smooth plastic material, bright bold colors, casual mobile game style.

lineart(8).png.caption: tag: casual_3d, object: xylophone, material: smooth_wood_plastic, rarity: standard. A colorful toy xylophone with red mallets. Rainbow colored rounded bars, thick playful proportions, smooth soft 3D shading, bright vibrant high-contrast colors.
